// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Pgm
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {


    inline static const std::array<int32_t, 3> values = {
        1, 2, 3
    };
    static constexpr std::array<int32_t, 3> keys = {
        1, 2, 3
    };

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const int32_t key) noexcept {

        const double product = static_cast<double>(22.333334f) * static_cast<double>(static_cast<uint32_t>(key) - static_cast<uint32_t>(1));
        int32_t pos = product <= 0.0 ? 0 : (product >= static_cast<double>(3) ? 3 : static_cast<int32_t>(product));
        if (pos > 3) pos = 3;

        size_t lo = pos >= 64 ? static_cast<size_t>(pos - 64) : 0;
        size_t hi = static_cast<size_t>(pos) + 66;
        if (hi > 3) hi = 3;

        while (lo < hi) {
            const size_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            const int32_t mid_key = keys[mid];
            if (mid_key == key)
                return true;
            if (mid_key < key)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid;
        }

        return false;
    }

    [[nodiscard]]
    static bool try_lookup(const int32_t key, const int32_t*& value) noexcept {

        const double product = static_cast<double>(22.333334f) * static_cast<double>(static_cast<uint32_t>(key) - static_cast<uint32_t>(1));
        int32_t pos = product <= 0.0 ? 0 : (product >= static_cast<double>(3) ? 3 : static_cast<int32_t>(product));
        if (pos > 3) pos = 3;

        size_t lo = pos >= 64 ? static_cast<size_t>(pos - 64) : 0;
        size_t hi = static_cast<size_t>(pos) + 66;
        if (hi > 3) hi = 3;

        while (lo < hi) {
            const size_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            const int32_t mid_key = keys[mid];

            if (mid_key == key) {
                value = &values[mid];
                return true;
            }

            if (mid_key < key)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid;
        }

        value = nullptr;
        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 3;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key = 1;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key = 3;
};
